subject: A small handheld scoop net with a circular metal hoop and fine white mesh, mounted on a short red and silver handle
description: A simple object-portrait illustration of a short-handled scoop net floating against a pale cream-to-white gradient background. The hoop is silver/chrome with a fine white mesh net stretched across it, and the grip is a glossy red baton with a metallic collar. No figures, no scene — the item is centered and rendered as a clean catalog-style trainer item.
